title: Persistence Feature Flags & Config Extension
goal: Extend config.py with all Week 3 feature flags (Cosmos persistence, leaderboard, prompt memory, Key Vault) and add optional Cosmos DB and Key Vault connection configuration loading.

in_scope: Add optional Cosmos DB config: COSMOS_ENDPOINT, COSMOS_DATABASE_NAME, COSMOS_CONTAINER_NAME
Add optional Key Vault config: KEYVAULT_URL
Add optional config for prompt text storage: PERSIST_PROMPT_TEXT (default: false)
Validate Cosmos config when persistence flag is enabled
Validate Key Vault config when keyvault flag is enabled

inputs: PRD Week 3 section 4 — All functional requirements and feature flags
outputs: src/config.py — updated with Week 3 feature flags and optional config
.env.example — updated with Cosmos, Key Vault, and persistence entries
dependencies: 1_arena_engine/Part 01 — _parse_bool helper and arena flags in config
checklist: Add FEATURE_PERSISTENCE_COSMOS to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_ARENA_LEADERBOARD to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_PROMPT_MEMORY_ENABLED to config loading (default: false)
Add FEATURE_KEYVAULT_ENABLED to config loading (default: false)
Add PERSIST_PROMPT_TEXT to config loading (default: false)
Read COSMOS_ENDPOINT from env (optional, required only when persistence enabled)
Read KEYVAULT_URL from env (optional, required only when keyvault enabled)
When feature_persistence_cosmos is true, validate COSMOS_ENDPOINT is present — raise ValueError if missing
When feature_keyvault_enabled is true, validate KEYVAULT_URL is present — raise ValueError if missing
Update .env.example with all new entries and section headers for Persistence, Key Vault
acceptance_criteria: load_config() returns all four new feature flags
Cosmos config keys (endpoint, database, container) are in config when persistence is enabled
Key Vault URL is in config when keyvault is enabled
Missing COSMOS_ENDPOINT with persistence enabled raises descriptive ValueError
Missing KEYVAULT_URL with keyvault enabled raises descriptive ValueError
review_focus: Conditional validation only triggers when the relevant flag is enabled
Default values for database and container names are reasonable
Flag naming convention remains consistent across all three weeks
No breaking changes to existing config consumers
risks_or_notes: Growing number of config keys — consider grouping related keys in .env.example with section comments
PERSIST_PROMPT_TEXT is a privacy control — default false is intentional for data minimization
Key Vault URL format should be validated (https://<vault-name>.vault.azure.net/)
Cosmos endpoint format varies by region — validate basic URL structure only
definition_of_done: All four feature flags load correctly with defaults
Conditional config validation works for Cosmos and Key Vault
No regression in existing config functionality
Config is testable with mocked environment variables
